creator: kut@mail.ru
text:
Repeatedly repeated message in the miniserv.error file:
Use of uninitialized value $ip in concatenation (.) or string at /usr/local/lib/webmin/system-status/system_info.pl line 37.
invalid option 'P'
usage:
        list [-Hpv] [-o property[,...]] [-T d|u] [pool] ... [interval [count]]

the following properties are supported:

        PROPERTY         EDIT   VALUES

        allocated          NO   <size>
 -- skipped --
        feature@...       YES   disabled | enabled | active

The feature@ properties must be appended with a feature name.
See zpool-features(7).
